title: Rahu Catalysts is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Rahu Catalysts is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Rahu Catalysts in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rahu Catalysts:
Rahu Catalysts is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts!
